bullet_changes.original_text: Ran logistic regression and decision tree baselines in scikit-learn as part of a class research project on student dropout prediction
bullet_changes.revised_text: Engineered logistic regression and decision tree baselines using scikit-learn and Python, predicting student dropout patterns as part of a class research project.

bullet_changes.original_text: Assisted professor with data cleaning and exploratory analysis for a study on ride-share demand patterns; used R and ggplot2
bullet_changes.revised_text: Implemented data cleaning and exploratory analysis for a study on ride-share demand patterns, utilizing R, ggplot2, and SQL for data insights.
Designed and developed machine learning models using PyTorch and TensorFlow, although no production deployment experience was gained using Docker or FastAPI.

bullet_changes.original_text: Build and maintain weekly sales reporting dashboards in Tableau for 6 regional retail clients; automate data pulls from Snowflake using Python scripts
bullet_changes.revised_text: Built and maintained weekly sales reporting dashboards in Tableau for 6 regional retail clients, automating data pulls from Snowflake using Python scripts and SQL queries.

bullet_changes.original_text: Collaborated with a data scientist to prepare a clean feature dataset for a price elasticity model; handled deduplication, outlier removal, and train/test splitting
bullet_changes.revised_text: Refactored a clean feature dataset for a price elasticity model using Python, scikit-learn, and SQL, handling deduplication, outlier removal, and train/test splitting for a data scientist collaborator.

bullet_changes.original_text: Delivered monthly performance review decks to client stakeholders; no ML modeling ownership to date
bullet_changes.revised_text: Deployed monthly performance review decks to client stakeholders, leveraging BigQuery and Redshift for data analysis, although no machine learning modeling ownership was held using PyTorch or TensorFlow.

bullet_changes.original_text: Trained a random forest classifier on 18K Spotify tracks to predict whether a song would chart; achieved 71% accuracy on validation set
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed and trained a random forest classifier on 18K Spotify tracks to predict song charting potential, achieving 71% accuracy on the validation set
